DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT THOMAS GOURLEY, THOMAS GOURLEY DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is Off Calendar, re-noticed for MAy 26, 2016. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: CROSS DEFENDANTS THOMAS GOURLEY, THOMAS GOURLEY'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Cross-Complaint sufficiently alleges each cause of action. Cross-Complaint is not uncertain. Moving party to provide courtesy copy of the declaration per CCP 430.41(a)(3) to department 501 no later than 4:30 p.m. on May 25, 2016. Moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future and provide courtesy copy of the pleading being challenged. Failure to comply will result in motion being taken off calendar.
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
